location.office_time_required: 3 days in Toronto office, 2 days working from home

secondary_archetype: AI Product Manager (enterprise B2B SaaS, legal/professional services)

level_signals: 3+ years in a people-management capacity leading product teams
JD title is 'Product Lead' but body references 'Director of Product'
Responsible for leading, mentoring, and growing a team of product managers

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 10+ years of product management experience, including 3+ years in a people-management capacity leading product teams at a B2B SaaS company serving enterprise customers.
employer_types_named: B2B SaaS company serving enterprise customers

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: including 3+ years in a people-management capacity leading product teams at a B2B SaaS company serving enterprise customers.
employer_types_named: B2B SaaS company serving enterprise customers

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: A track record of shipping high-quality products end-to-end, from discovery and definition through launch and iteration, in fast-paced and ambiguous environments.
Demonstrated ability to think strategically and operate tactically — comfortable setting long-term vision while rolling up your sleeves to solve immediate customer problems.
Strong analytical and communication skills, with experience using data to drive decisions and the ability to articulate a clear product vision to both technical and non-technical audiences.
A technical background or strong technical fluency, enabling productive collaboration with engineering teams on complex system design and trade-offs.
Experience operating in high-growth environments where priorities shift quickly and the ability to navigate ambiguity is essential.

scope.surface: One or more of Harvey's core product areas serving enterprise professional services customers; role anchored in Toronto office
scope.business_model: B2B SaaS, enterprise, AI platform for legal and professional services
core_responsibilities: Define and drive the product strategy and roadmap for one or more of Harvey's core product areas
Lead, mentor, and grow a team of product managers
Partner with Engineering and Design to deliver high-quality, scalable product experiences
Engage directly with customers, Customer Success, and Sales to deeply understand workflows, pain points, and opportunities
Drive alignment across senior stakeholders on trade-offs, sequencing, and resource allocation
Establish and track key metrics for product adoption, engagement, and business impact
Help shape the local Toronto team culture while contributing to company-wide product strategy

green_flags: Clear hybrid working policy stated (3 days office, 2 days remote)
Company has strong product-market fit signals: 1500+ customers, 60+ countries
Founding team opportunity in Toronto office — meaningful ownership potential
Well-funded with world-class investor support mentioned
Explicit equal opportunity employer statement and disability accommodation process
red_flags: Role title is 'Product Lead' in identity fields but body consistently references 'Director of Product' — possible title mismatch or intentional leveling ambiguity worth clarifying
Compensation and equity details entirely absent
Visa sponsorship status not mentioned at all
Toronto-only hybrid role; fully remote or US-based candidates not eligible
No mention of AI/legal domain experience as a requirement despite it being a core product area — could signal very high bar in other areas
